data.title: Add dso:code-reviewer-test-quality to agent-routing.conf
data.description:
## Description
Add a routing entry for the test quality overlay agent to config/agent-routing.conf.
Add: test_quality_review=dso:code-reviewer-test-quality|general-purpose

### File Impact
- config/agent-routing.conf (modify — add one line)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] agent-routing.conf contains test_quality_review entry
  Verify: grep -q "test_quality_review" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/config/agent-routing.conf
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
